I have created the Windmill workflow file with the exponential backoff retry logic using `sleep()` as requested.

The implementation is located at `/home/user/windmill-project/f/workflows/api_caller.ts` and exports the `main` workflow that calls the `callApi` task. It properly implements the exponential backoff by waiting 5s, 10s, and 20s between attempts.

A copy of the file has also been preserved in `/logs/artifacts/code/api_caller.ts`.
